name: ActivityStats
description: Tracks per-server message counts and received reaction counts with message and reaction leaderboard commands.
author: itsneufox
install_msg: ActivityStats loaded! Use `/messages`, `/reactions`, `/topmessages`, or `/topreacts` after syncing slash commands. Prefix commands still work with `[p]activitystats` and related commands. Use `[p]activitystats backfill` to import old channel history.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores message IDs mapped to author IDs, per-user message counts, per-channel message counts, per-message reaction snapshots, and per-user received reaction counters. It does not store message content. Administrators can clear stored data with `[p]activitystats reset`.
